description:
The OverlappingLayout is best explained on the UIX page. The description for such is as follows:

A [Overlapping layout] layout overlaps or places on top of another layout in the same space.

fields.PaddingTop: The padding from the center content to the top side.
fields.PaddingRight: The padding from the center content to the right side.
fields.PaddingBottom: The padding from the center content to the bottom side.
fields.PaddingLeft: The padding from the center content to the left side.
fields.HorizontalAlign: The alignment of the content horizontally.
fields.VerticalAlign: The alignment of the content vertically.
fields.ForceExpandWidth: Whether content inside this layout going beyond the normal container size of this layout should be forced to go beyond the container so it fits width wise.
fields.ForceExpandHeight: Whether content inside this layout going beyond the normal container size of this layout should be forced to go beyond the container so it fits height wise.
